TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sulungan, title = Sulungan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sulungan} }

S.FORM: alang Sʉhlʉnganʉ/Sulungan ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 41 buwan, 108 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 95 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 69%, Rukay 3%, Cou 7%, Paywan 1%, Hla'aluwa 6%, Setik 1%.

alang Sʉhlʉnganʉ/Sulungan ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 41 buwan, 108 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 95 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 69%, Rukay 3%, Cou 7%, Paywan 1%, Hla'aluwa 6%, Setik 1%.
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕ*ħl*ŋan*/s~ɕuluŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, rukaj *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%, ħlaʔaluwa *%, s~ɕetik *%.
